query:
INSERT INTO projects (name, clientId, status, createdById, createdByRole, planPeriodMonths, notificationFrequency)
SELECT 
  'Projeto Teste E2E - Adequação Reforma Tributária',
  id,
  'assessment_fase1',
  id,
  'cliente',
  12,
  'semanal'
FROM users WHERE email = 'cliente.teste@example.com' LIMIT 1;
